holdings.infoBox: IDV is an equity ETF with a total of 136 individual holdings. The top holdings are TotalEnergies SE stock at 4.50%, British American Tobacco p.l.c. at 3.84%, Enel SpA at 3.06%, Rio Tinto Group at 2.99%, and Eni S.p.A. at 2.68%.

overview.description: The iShares International Select Dividend ETF (IDV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones EPAC Select Dividend index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of 100 of the highest-yielding securities in developed countries outside the US. IDV was launched on Jun 11, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Dow Jones EPAC Select Dividend Index
